texto: But what does interest me is the notion that if you do a lot of work it means there's a potential for other people to understand that a lot of things are possible with a sustained effort and that the broadening of experiences is possible and I think that's all art can be.
explicacao: Citação de Richard Serra sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “But what does interest me is the notion that if you do a lot of work it means there's a potential…” articula reflexao, work, effort em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e viagem.
